query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.department, s.totalSales, s.totalPoints,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as vendas_reais,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_vendas,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM fei_records WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_fei,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM sdr_records WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_sdr,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM consignment_records WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_consig,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points + bonusPoints), 0) FROM dispatch_records WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_desp
FROM sellers s WHERE s.active = true ORDER BY s.name

  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM consignment_records WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_consig,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points + bonusPoints), 0) FROM dispatch_records WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as pontos_desp
FROM sellers s WHERE s.active = true ORDER BY s.name
